creator: wefa@callcenter.systemhaus.net
text:
a bug in the CHMOD command description line garbles the output

I'm not a [n|g]roff expert, but the following patch seems
to correct it.

Fix: 

diff ftpd.8.org ftpd.8
216c216
< .It CHMOD Ta change mode of a file, e.g. ``SITE CHMOD 755 filename''
---
> .It CHMOD Ta "change mode of a file, e.g. ``SITE CHMOD 755 filename''"
